title: Area of Circle Calculator - Free & Instant
description: Free area of circle calculator. Calculate circle area, circumference, and diameter from radius. Includes step-by-step formula explanation.
keywords: area of circle calculator, circle area formula, circumference calculator, circle calculator, pi r squared
intro: Calculate the area, circumference, and diameter of a circle. Enter the radius to get instant results.

faq.q: What is the formula for area of a circle?
faq.a: Area = π × r², where r is the radius. For example, a circle with radius 5 has area = π × 25 ≈ 78.54 square units.

faq.q: How do I find the radius from area?
faq.a: Radius = √(Area / π). Divide the area by π, then take the square root.
Circumference = 2 × π × r, or equivalently π × d, where d is the diameter.
